Tests that the `foo` function in object `a` returns 1.

# Purpose
This code defines a simple JavaScript object `a` with a single method `foo`. The `foo` method returns the integer `1` when called. The code includes an assertion to verify that calling `a.foo()` returns `1`, ensuring the method behaves as expected. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as a basic test or demonstration of object method definition and assertion in JavaScript.
